channel.title: About on Notes
channel.description: Recent content in About on Notes

item.title: About
item.description: Biography 소프트웨어 개발자 입니다. 대한민국 대전에 거주하고 있습니다. Contacts euikook at gmail.com

item.title: Git Override
item.description: Personal alias git='git -c "user.name=euikook" -c "user.email=euikook@gmail.com"' Custom Domain alias git='git -c "user.name=euikook" -c "user.email=euikook@harues.com"' Workspace alias git='git -c "user.name=euikook" -c "user.email=ekkim@netvisiontel.com"'
